sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game - sub-pixel system not applicable

special_mechanics.name: Puyo Matching
special_mechanics.description: Core puzzle mechanic where player matches colored puyos to eliminate them and create chains

special_mechanics.name: Garbage Block Offsetting
special_mechanics.description: Mechanic introduced in Puyo Puyo 2 onwards allowing players to counter opponent attacks by sending chains back

special_mechanics.name: Chain System
special_mechanics.description: Cascading matches create chains that send garbage blocks to opponent

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Puzzle game with no documented physics parameters. Movement/gravity/jump mechanics not applicable. Game focuses on block matching and chain mechanics rather than character physics.
